unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I got home late last night. I was very tired and went straight to bed.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: str(死人) + aight(看作eight, 8) -> 8个人死死地笔直站着。
recent(最近的) + ly(副词后缀) -> 最近地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Emily has earned a lot of money this year.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ea(姨) + rn(融入) -> 姨融入了社会，开始赚(earn)钱了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There was a bus drivers' strike last week, so there were no buses.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: s(死) + trike(三轮车) -> 骑着三轮车去抗议罢工(strike)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Now he works as a gardener.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: garden(花园) + er(人) -> 在花园里工作的人就是园丁。
won(赢) + der(得) -> 想知道(wonder)怎样才能赢得比赛。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yes, but the movie was awful.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: aw(噢) + ful(充满的) -> 噢，充满了糟糕(awful)的事情。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Did you eat a lot of sweets when you were a child?
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sweet(甜的) + s(复数) -> 甜的东西就是糖果。
b(爸) + ridge(山脊) -> 爸爸在山脊上架起了一座桥。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's been a really good holiday.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: holi(神圣的) + day(日子) -> 神圣放假的日子就是假期。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Paul and Lucy arrived ten minutes ago.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ar(阿) + rive(河) -> 阿到达了河边。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My grandfather died before I was born.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: di(大) + e(鹅) -> 大鹅死了。
